programme.title: Capítulo 146
programme.desc: Franco finds out Mia isn't with Carlo and Roberta. Paola begs for Diego's forgiveness, which he gives, but refuses to take her back. Mia and Gastón go out on a date. Vico calls Celina's mom to stop her from making a life change. Carlo and Robert go search for Mia. Celina's mom sets her up on a date; however, the date proves to be beneficial to Celina. Roberta ruins Simon's date by saying she's pregnant and underage.

programme.title: Capítulo 147
programme.desc: Nico breaks up with Karen. Gastón tells Mia he wants to speak to her dad. Teo receives a gift. Simon plans to get Roberta back for flattening his tires. Paola lies to Roberta that her and Diego are back together to get revenge. Miguel tells Teo he will take his place at the Lodge initiation.

programme.title: Capítulo 148
programme.desc: León gives Diego a brand new car; Roberta crashes it. Gastón confronts Mia about her lingering feelings for Miguel. The Lodge figures out Miguel took Teo place; the later kidnap and torture Teo. Miguel and Mia kiss. Nico is told by Karen's father that the band is no longer welcome at his club. Giovanni, Diego, and Tomás put Madariaga's picture on an online dating site.

programme.title: Capítulo 149
programme.desc: Nico is upset about Karen's father, Jacobo's, decision about the band. Gastón orders Mia to call her father so they can talk. Teo is tied up by the Lodge and tortured. Diego finds out it was Roberta who crashed his car. Viviana misleads Franco to get Mia in trouble. The other band members try to convince Diego to come back to the band; without him they can't perform at the club. José's tutor comes to take her out but also to tell her to get close to Gastón. Gastón follows Mia and sees the band.

programme.title: Capítulo 150
programme.desc: The band finds out Gastón saw them perform; Miguel blames Mia, the others agree. Giovanni tries to rescue Teo but they are both caught and tortured. Nico tells his mother that he is in love with Lupita, not Karen. It's revealed that Pilar is in the Lodge. Viviana threatens Mia that she will tell Franco; later writes a fake fan letter even after Miguel asked her not to. Nico's mom tells Lupita to break up with Nico if she loves him.

programme.title: Capítulo 151
programme.desc: Giovanni climbs through the vents, onto the roof, then falls where he is later found by Tomás and Lupita. Gastón rebuffs Mia. Miguel, Diego, Tomás and Nico try to get Gandia to listen to them about the Lodge. A woman from the online dating site confronts a confused Madariaga. Gastón receives a love note from Mia. Roberta disrespectfully embarrasses Alma in front of Carlo and the others; however she is mistaken. Madariaga and the other boys help save Teo.

programme.title: Capítulo 152
programme.desc: Gandia and Mendiola want to act like the Lodge doesn't exist. Miguel tries to draw the Lodge out. Franco tells Mia that Valeria will move in. Diego curses Giovanni and calls him a traitor. The kids are lied to about Teo's condition. The Lodge plans revenge on Miguel. Mia decides to play Valeria's game. Giovanni reflects on the good and bad. José makes a deal with Gastón so she can see Teo; she tells his father she's his girlfriend; she reveals her true feelings.

programme.title: Capítulo 153
programme.desc: José kisses Teo after revealing her feelings; though he's unconscious. Giovanni reveal he knows where all the records of the Lodge are kept; him, Miguel, and Diego try to retrieve them but get caught by the Lodge. Gandia finds out Pilar is apart of the Lodge but vows to protect her. Rodrigo sets the basement on fire, trapping the guys. Franco finds out Mia is in the band. Roberta and the others convince Gandia to rescue the guys.

programme.title: Capítulo 154
programme.desc: Roberta saves the Lodge files from burning; she gives them to Gandia. Gandia tells Mendiola the Lodge exists and is ordered to get rid of the evidence. Mia tells Miguel what Viviana did. Gandia and Mendiola plan to blame everything on Giovanni. Alma has decided to never bother Roberta again. Miguel confront Viviana about the letter; he breaks up with her. Teo and his father reconnect.

programme.title: Gran final: Part 1

programme.title: Síntomas empáticos
programme.desc: Luis descubre que es él (y no Silvia), quien tiene los síntomas del embarazo. Los vecinos encuentran en la calle carteles pegados de: "Se busca a Jorjáis".

programme.title: La hija de Jorjais
programme.desc: Una mujer le pregunta a Germán sobre el paradero de Jorjáis, y él se sorprende al descubrir que ella es su hija. Vanessa cree que tiene la maldición de la soltería.

programme.title: Niño o niña
programme.desc: Luis ya no sabe que hacer con Silvia porque tiene muchos cambios de humor por el embarazo, pero sus vecinos lo convencen de darle una sorpresa que jamás olvidará.

programme.title: Conserje aprendiz
programme.desc: Lorena acepta hacer un casting para interpretar el papel de La Doña. Germán decide enseñarle a Borrego a ser un gran conserje.

programme.title: El perfume
programme.desc: Magdalena se aprovecha de las náuseas que siente Silvia por el embarazo para que Luis le compre todo lo que ella quiere.

programme.title: Apolonio y la víbora
programme.desc: Vanesa lleva una serpiente al edificio y se le escapa. Ahora tiene que recuperarla sin que los vecinos se enteren. Silvia y Luis toman un curso psicoprofiláctico con una chica que resulta ser la ex de Luis.

programme.title: La chapa
programme.desc: Luis descompone la chapa de la reja, quedando él y Silvia afuera y el resto de los vecinos adentro. En lo que reparan la chapa, los vecinos usan a Luis de mandadero.

programme.title: Los tocatimbres
programme.desc: Germán cree que los timbres del edificio están embrujados, pues alguien los hace sonar constantemente. Luis intenta colocar unas repisas en el cuarto del bebé.

programme.title: Arturo más pordiosero
programme.desc: Los López Pérez se hacen pasar por pordioseros para recibir caridad. Pedro lleva varios días sin bañarse y Cris le exige que lo haga.

programme.title: El parto
programme.desc: Silvia comienza el trabajo de parto en el departamento, no hay tiempo para llegar al hospital. Luis recibirá al bebé con la ayuda de los vecinos.

programme.title: Vecinos consejeros
programme.desc: El hijo de Silvia y Luis no para de llorar y ya no saben qué hacer. Los vecinos les aconsejan cómo cuidar al bebé mientras Germán improvisa un gimnasio en el vestíbulo.

programme.title: Mucha luz
programme.desc: Hay fallas de energía eléctrica en algunos de los departamentos y Luis tiene que ir a trabajar al departamento de los López Pérez. Germán se prepara para su examen de admisión a la preparatoria en línea.

programme.title: Ya valió barriga
programme.desc: Un nuevo inquilino llega al departamento, su nombre es: Hipólito Menchaca y tiene un gran parecido con el famoso actor Édgar Vivar. Los vecinos quieren quedar bien con él.

programme.title: La jefa del Rocko
programme.desc: La mamá de Rocko viene a conocer a su nieto Morris y tiene la intención de llevarlo a vivir con ella y darle la vida que se merece. Liz se vuelve representante de Benito y le consigue un papel en una película.

programme.title: Conserjerito inglés
programme.desc: Germán y compañía toman clases de inglés en línea con Silvia. Cuando Miss Silvia reprueba a Germán, este descubre la forma de desquitarse. Rocko tiene problemas de oído y creen que se está quedando sordo.

programme.title: La toalla del mojado 2
programme.desc: Frankie recibe una visita inesperada, la famosa actriz Lyn May, quien lo inspira a que haga la película de La toalla del mojado 2. Pedro se encarga de cuidar a Luisito Jr. para que Luis pueda descansar.

programme.title: La veterinaria de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa por fin cumple el sueño de tener su propia veterinaria y, con ayuda de su novio Fabián, renta el local que está en el edificio. Los López Pérez compran una lavadora nueva y la colocan en el pasillo frente al departamento de Luis.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - Skunk Pig: Mexico Javelina
programme.desc: While Steven Rinella has hunted for javelina, in this episode hes shown an entirely new tactic when his buddy.

programme.title: MeatEater - Swamp Stew: Michigan Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest.

programme.title: MeatEater - Primal Cuts: Bone-in Cooking Special
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater - El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater - Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater - Full Boar: Whole Hog Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steven Rinella breaks down an entire boar and shares some of his favorite recipes in this Cooking Special. Matt Weingarter helps steve make head cheese, pork skin cracklins, smoked pork butt, and a tied-roast boned-out ham. Each dish requires thoughtful butchering, processing, and cooking to execute to perfection.

programme.title: MeatEater - Southeast Alaska Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and Evan Hafer head into Southeast Alaska's coastal rainforest to hunt Sitka black-tailed deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Nebraska Whitetails
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and Clay Newcomb head to Nebraska's Sandhills for a whitetail deer hunt, guided by Jordan.

programme.title: MeatEater - Louisiana Ducks
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins Jean-Paul Bourgeois and Ronnie Collins in Louisiana‚ Mississippi Delta for a duck hunt. Surrounded by the unique landscape of the Delta, they target multiple duck species. After a successful hunt, the team returns to camp, where Jean-Paul prepares a traditional Cajun meal featuring the day‚ catch. Experience the cultural tradition of turning fresh game into flavorful, local dishes like duck gumbo and crawfish boil.

programme.title: MeatEater - New Mexico Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to New Mexico's Gila Wilderness with his friend Carl Malcolm to hunt Merriam's turkeys. Set against a backdrop of stunning landscapes and rich history, they explore the first federally protected wilderness in the world. Although few and far between, the duo find gobbling birds through hard scouting and perserverence.

programme.title: Keep It (The Colbert Necessities)
programme.desc: Louis Virtel is joined by Guy Branum to discuss the Canadian magic of Martin Short and his new documentary Marty, Life is Short. Then, Louis and Guy chat about The Late Show with Stephen Colbert ending and what that means for late night television. Plus, friend of the show Mandy Moore returns to chat pop music and her new movie The Breadwinner.

programme.title: Assembly Required with Stacey Abrams (How the Left Can Take Back States’ Rights)
programme.desc: Why are state governments more important than ever? While the Trump administration has been busy gutting and remaking the federal government, it’s critical to remember that the power in Washington was given to it by…the states. This week, Stacey is joined by Pennsylvania House Speaker Joanna McClinton and Daniel Squadron, cofounder of The States Project and author of The Fourth Branch. They talk about the biggest lessons from their own time as elected officials, the critical ways that state legislatures impact peoples’ lives, share stories of their biggest victories, and argue that the states can be a powerful tool in the fight for Democracy.

programme.title: Pod Save America (Is It Gay to Flip Texas?)
programme.desc: After Ken Paxton's victory in the Texas Senate Republican primary runoff, the MAGA faithful set their sights on James Talarico, attempting to disqualify him for being too much of a beta male for Texas. Will it stick? The White House is on the verge of getting Iran to the table to negotiate, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent dismisses concerns that the U.S. economy is heading toward stagflation, and Trump accelerates his quest to stamp his image on Washington, covering statues in gold and attempting to create a $250 bill with his own face on it. On the presidential family front: ProPublica reports that the administration funneled millions to a company owned in part by Donald Trump Jr., while Dr. Jill Biden finally speaks candidly about her reaction to her husband's infamous 2024 debate performance. Then, Scott Colom, the Democratic nominee for Mississippi's U.S. Senate seat, stops by the studio to talk to Jon about why he believes the deep-red state is in play.

programme.title: Pod Save America (
programme.desc: Pod Save America is a no-bullshit conversation about politics hosted by former Obama aides Jon Favreau, Jon Lovett, Dan Pfeiffer, and Tommy Vietor. It cuts through the noise to break down the week’s news and helps people figure out what matters and how they can help. They’re regularly joined by journalists, activists, politicians, entertainers, and world leaders.

programme.title: Pod Save America (Gavin Newsom Is Finally Comfortable with Himself)
programme.desc: California Governor Gavin Newsom sits down with Jon and Tommy before a live audience in Los Angeles to discuss Trump's war on Iran, the crowded California gubernatorial primary, and his new book Young Man in a Hurry: A Memoir of Discovery. The governor talks about his close childhood friendship with the Getty family, issuing the first same-sex marriage licenses nationwide as San Francisco Mayor, and his surprising childhood pet, Potter the otter.

programme.title: Runaway Country with Alex Wagner (The Other MAGA War….At Home)
programme.desc: While the Trump administration wages war against Iran and broadens their military scope in the northern hemisphere, there are more subtle campaigns being pushed here at home – like the one to convince women to do nothing more than have babies and stay at home. This week, Alex speaks to former trad wife and host of “The Wake Her Up Podcast”, Sharon Johnson, about her upbringing in the Mormon Church, what it was like to discover she could have agency and choice in her late thirties, and how she feels about trad wives trending. Then Alex is joined by host of Crooked’s “Hysteria” podcast, Erin Ryan, to talk about the broader political goals behind the Heritage Foundation’s Project 2026 plan, and how it attempts to punish women who don’t fit their ideals.

programme.title: My Friend Ben
programme.desc: Finding Samantha struggling to repair a lamp, Aunt Clara uses her uncertain powers of magic to summon an electrician. Benjamin Franklin, in l8th century clothes, appears. Samantha is upset by Ben's presence and Aunt Clara's wail that she can't remember how to undo the spell. Darrin, astonished by Ben's appearance in his home, can't convince Larry Tate that Ben is not is creation for an advertising campaign for Franklin Elec-tronics. Abner Kravitz refuses to believe Gladys' report that the real Ben Franklin is at the Stephens'. Bowing to Samantha's pleas, Darrin agrees to allow her and Aunt Clara to show Ben how his inventions are being used is the city. The next morning Ben, leaving a note that he has decided to tour the city alone to avoid causing domestic discord, sets out. Darrin, Samantha and Aunt Clara start searching for him. At a firehouse, inspecting an old fire engine, Ben steps on the accelerator. The engine shoots out into the street and slams into a curb. Ben is arrested and taken to court, where the judge, sure it is all a publicity stunt, charges him with grand larceny and sets bail at a thousand dollars. Darrin puts up the bail, knowing he will lose it if Ben doesn't appear for trial is a month. Just then, Aunt Clara remembers the spell and Ben vanishes.

programme.title: Samantha For The Defense
programme.desc: Summing up "My Friend Ben" Samantha tells how Aunt Clara, trying to summon an electrician to fix a lamp, produces Ben Franklin instead.

programme.title: My Husband The Rooster Renter
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) calls in a roofer, a plumber and agricultural expert Hank Kimball (Alvy Moore). All of them give the same appraisal of his farm: it's a disaster! Meanwhile, Mr. Haney (Pat Buttram) has a few chickens he'd like to rent out!

programme.title: Furniture, Who's Got The Furniture?
programme.desc: The Douglases are awaiting the arrival of their furniture and they don't know it, but Oliver's mother is on her way, too. But when the furniture is accidentally delivered to Mr. Haney's new place, he tries to sell their own possession back to them.

programme.title: Neighborliness
programme.desc: Planting season ends in three weeks and Oliver has yet to get his land plowed. Meanwhile, Uncle Joe (Edgar Buchanan) needs a new shotgun before duck hunting season starts and schemes to solve both of their problems...without Oliver knowing it.

programme.title: Lisa, The Helpmate
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) sends a sample of his soil to the State Scientific College, a report comes back that his farm contains ingredients never before found in soil. Could his soil problems just be cosmetic? Eleanor Audley guest stars.

programme.title: You Can't Plug In A 2 With A 6
programme.desc: Relying on statistics provided by the Department of Agriculture, Oliver (Eddie Albert) decides to plant wheat. But when he goes to Drucker's to buy seed, he learns the other farmers have a unique way to predict the best crop�Mrs. Ziffel's lumbago.

programme.title: Don't Call Us, We'll Call You
programme.desc: After some wheeling and dealing and mending a riff between Mr. Kimball and his mother, Oliver (Eddie Albert) finally has a phone installed, but the Hooterville Phone Company installs it directly outside his bedroom window...on top of the phone pole.

programme.title: Parity Begins At Home
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) plants his entire 160 acres with wheat, only to hear from The Crabwell Corners Conservation and Stabilization Committee, a local farm organization, that he was only permitted to grow eight acres of wheat�because of Mr. Haney.

programme.title: Lisa Has A Calf
programme.desc: The cow that Oliver (Eddie Albert) bought from Mr. Haney is pregnant. Afraid that Haney will claim the new calf, Oliver and Eb decide to keep it secret...only to have the people of Hooterville think that it is Lisa (Eva Gabor) who is expecting!

programme.title: The Wedding Anniversary
programme.desc: It's the Douglases' wedding anniversary and, after initially pretending not to remember, Oliver (Eddie Albert) makes clear that he knows the date very well, he just can't remember exactly how many years he and Lisa (Eva Gabor) have been married.

programme.title: What Happened In Scranton
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is shocked that Hooterville has no beauty parlor, and the Ladies' Every-Other-Wednesday Afternoon-Discussion-Club nominates her to make it happen. Of course, Oliver's mother is happy to help, even if it means underhanded tactics.

programme.title: Give Me Land, Lots Of Land
programme.desc: When Oliver's neighbor, Mr. Watson, decides to do some traveling, Oliver (Eddie Albert) buys the farm which adjoins his property, but not the house on it. Lisa (Eva Gabor) misunderstands and thinks the beautiful farmhouse is their new home.

programme.title: I Didn't Raise My Husband To Be A Fireman
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers the only requirement to join the Hooterville Valley Fire Department is that he must play a musical instrument. Meanwhile Lisa (Eva Gabor) tries her hand at cooking something besides "hotscakes" for breakfast.

programme.title: Lisa Bakes A Cake
programme.desc: Believing he will never get a moment's peace, Oliver (Eddie Albert) is annoyed when Lisa (Eva Gabor) puts a listing in the new phone book: "Oliver Douglas, Attorney at Law"�but it is a different story when no one calls for his services.

programme.title: The Price Of Apples
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert)'s apple crop is ready to be harvested, and he decides to take them to market himself and make a killing. Of course, getting to market before the price drops proves a little more difficult than Oliver anticipates.

programme.title: What's In A Name?
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) becomes enamored of Mr. Kimball (Alvy Moore), the county agent. However, though she feminizes herself and gets all gussied up, he refuses to go out with a girl named Ralph. Can Oliver solve the situation legally?

programme.title: The Day Of Decision
programme.desc: Six months is up! Now, Lisa (Eva Gabor) gets to decide whether she and Oliver (Eddie Albert) will remain on the farm or go back to New York and their Park Avenue lifestyle! Will this be the final straw for Green Acres?

programme.title: The Deputy
programme.desc: Sam Drucker (Frank Cady) is leaving on a much-needed two-week vacation and talks Oliver (Eddie Albert) into assuming his duties as deputy sheriff. But Oliver soon learns enforcing the law isn't quite as easy as it looks.

programme.title: The Addams Family And The Spaceman
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: My Son, The Chimp
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: Morticia's Favorite Charity
programme.desc: Moriticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Progress And The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Toupee
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: Cousin Itt And The Vocational Counselor
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: Lurch, The Teenage Idol
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Winning Of Morticia Addams
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight, members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: My Fair Cousin Itt
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 1)
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 2)
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: Morticia Meets Royalty
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: Gomez, The People's Choice
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: Cousin Itt's Problem
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: Halloween, Addams Style
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: Morticia, The Writer
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it, he will lose her.

programme.title: Morticia, The Sculptress
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets, a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: Breaking Gender Norms
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy take on their most exciting challenge yet with Alan, a recently transitioned trans man seeking a bold, androgynous style. After years of prioritizing comfort over self-expression, Alan is ready to embrace a look that defies traditional norms. Together, they craft a style that brings Alan a true joy that is uniquely his own, breaking the rules of fashion along the way.

programme.title: Country Glitz and Glam
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy meet Naomi, former Amish and ex-stripper, who is seeking help after reverting to traditional Amish dress to hide her post-pregnancy body. Now back on the farm and raising a toddler, she yearns for the confidence she felt during her stripper days. Clinton and Stacy help Naomi find a style that both reclaims her femininity and balances her life as a new mom with a country heart.

programme.title: Masculine Avant-Garde
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy meet Maurice, a larger-than-life baker and devoted single dad ready to elevate his style to prepare for the opening of his new storefront. Needing a look to represent his brand, Maurice turns to Clinton and Stacy for help in creating a “masculine avant-garde” look that embodies his vibrant personality and commands respect as a successful business owner.

programme.title: 90s Preppy
programme.desc: Clinton and Stacy welcome Selena, a goth content creator seeking a dramatic style transformation. Having worn an all-black aesthetic since middle school, Selena realizes that it hinders her ability to connect with others and looks for guidance to uncover a more approachable style that reflects her evolving identity.

programme.title: Why Fear & Horror Feels Kinda Good
programme.desc: Why are we drawn to fear? This fascination often balances us the edge of life and death, infused with a dash of excitement. From his beginnings as a Navy SEAL to becoming a renowned YouTuber, Mr. Ballen possesses a unique storytelling talent. He captivates us with some of the most spine-chilling true stories, drawn both from his experiences and the lives of others. Expect to learn why so many people are obsessed with True Crime and scary stories, the 3 terrifying but true stories MrBallen has prepared in this episode today, what being a NAVY Seal taught MrBallen about life & the backlash he has gotten from the NAVY Seal community by sharing his story, what it means to live a good life, if there is life after death, how to reinvent your entire life, what it takes to tell a good story and much more...

programme.title: Why Is Everyone So Emotionally Fragile?
programme.desc: Emotional maturity is a difficult thing to truly come by. Making your needs known, setting boundaries, being able to disappoint people without being afraid. If it's such an important skill, why is it so hard to discover how to develop it? Expect to learn how Whitney has been changed since becoming a mother, why Whitney has been thinking about circumcision so much, what codependence is and how to overcome it, why your niceness might be narcissism in disguise, why the news and memes are moving at such an insane velocity right now and much more...

programme.title: The Biology Of Focus, Success & Long-Term Energy
programme.desc: From personal dramas to scientific uproars, it's been a wild year for the biggest health & fitness podcaster in the world. And today we get to discover his biggest new insights about life, relationships and protocols. Expect to learn whether you actually should drink coffee within 90 minutes of waking up, how to get the best sleep of your life according to the latest science, how to become a morning person, what Andrew has learned about the perils of fame and public scrutiny, what new research says on the world of longevity supplements, why you should always do your research when testing with peptides and much more…

programme.title: What Will The Neighbors Think?
programme.desc: Courtesy of a freak accident (and The Outer Limits), an agoraphobe (Jane Adams) begins to hear the private thoughts of all of the tenants in her building...the good, the bad and the steamy. And it seems at least one of them may want to kill her.

programme.title: The Shroud
programme.desc: A scientist -- who is also a religious zealot (David Ogden Stiers) -- secretly implants an embryo created with DNA from the Shroud of Turin into a young woman (Samantha Mathis) in order to scientifically engineer the Second Coming of Christ.

programme.title: Ripper
programme.desc: The Outer Limits come to Victorian Whitechapel when a London doctor (Cary Elwes) races to capture the alien creature responsible for the Jack the Ripper murders. But when the alien frames the good doctor for the murders, his time may be up.

programme.title: Tribunal
programme.desc: The son (Saul Rubinek) of a concentration camp survivor (Peter Boretski) gets some unique help in proving the guilt of a former Nazi (Jan Rubes) living in the U.S....courtesy of a time traveler (Alex Daikun) and, of course, The Outer Limits.

programme.title: Summit
programme.desc: The planets Earth and Dregocia struggle to re-establish a fragile trust after a summit goes tragically wrong. Can a diplomat (Marcia Cross) calm the hawkish nature of both species…and can she overcome her own prejudices to save both worlds?

programme.title: Descent
programme.desc: A meek anthropologist (Leland Orser) develops a serum for genetic dominance and tests it on himself. Now his newfound confidence takes complete control of him, turning him into an irrational, overly aggressive troglodyte! Can he reverse the process?

programme.title: The Haven
programme.desc: The Haven is a high-tech apartment building which is run by supercomputer and almost completely eliminates the need for human contact. But when things begin to go wrong, neighbors who have never met must learn to work together in order to survive!

programme.title: Deja Vu
programme.desc: When a scientist's (Kevin Nealon) experiment unintentionally creates a rift in the space-time continuum, he suddenly find himself caught in a time loop and soon begins to suspects sabotage. Terri Hawkes, Jennifer Copping and Ronny Cox also star.

programme.title: Stranded
programme.desc: A boy (Adam Hann-Byrd) , picked on by high-school bullies and neglected by his own father (Daniel Hugh Kelley), finds comfort in an alien (Chris Potter) who has crash-landed on earth. But is the alien what he claims to be? Never…in The Outer Limits.

programme.title: Starcrossed
programme.desc: In a world dominated by alien invaders, a cynical American cafe owner (Nathan Fillion) must decide if he will risk his life to help an old lover fight for Earth or if he is happy not rocking the political boat. Derek de Lint also stars.
